mapper.select: /* SQL ID : StdDAO.select 설 명 : 학습자 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , B.USERNM , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USER_ID , A.ATNDLC_STSCD , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.AUDIT_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_CERT_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_FNSH_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_SBJCT_ID , A.FNSH_ID , A.ACQS_CRDTS , A.DOC_RCPTYN , A.DOC_RCPT_NO , NVL(A.DEPTNM, (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD)) AS DEPTNM , A.RGN_CD , A.EMP_ID , A.SCR_EXLNYN , A.RECV_NOTICE_YN , A.AIS_DATA_LNKGYN , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'MN_DSBL_CD' AND CD = B.MN_DSBL_CD) AS DISABILITY_CD_NM , B.MN_DSBL_GRDCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'MN_DSBL_GRDCD' AND CD = B.MN_DSBL_GRDCD) AS DISABILITY_LV_NM , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'MN_DSBL_CD' AND CD = B.SCND_DSBL_CD) AS SUB_DISABILITY_CD_NM , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'MN_DSBL_GRDCD' AND CD = B.SCND_DSBL_GRDCD) AS SUB_DISABILITY_LV_NM , B.MOBILE_NO , B.EMAIL , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , NVL(A.SCYR,'-') SCYR , (SELECT MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM) FROM TB_LOG_LESSON_ACTN_HSTY WHERE SBJCT_ID = 'DSBLREQ' AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND ACTV_HSTRY_CD = 'EXAM') AS dsblDttm FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S'
/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listStudentInfo 설 명 : 수강정보 > 수강생 정보 목록 */
/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listStudentInfoPaging 설 명 : 수강정보 > 수강생 정보 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listDisablilityStudentInfoPaging 설 명 : 수강정보 > 장애학생 정보 목록 페이징 */

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listStudentInfoExcel 설 명 : 수강정보 > 수강생 정보 엑셀 리스트 */ SELECT A.* , COUNT(1) OVER() - TO_NUMBER(A.LINE_NO) + 1 AS NO , CASE WHEN A.AUDITYN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_ABNDYN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN A.UNIV_CD = 'C' THEN '수강포기' ELSE '수강철회' END ELSE '청강생' END ELSE '학생' END AS AUDIT_NM , (CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.MID_ADD_TIME > 0 THEN '시간연장' ELSE '-' END || '/' || CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.ADD_MNTS > 0 THEN '시간연장' ELSE '-' END ) AS REQ_STATUS , (CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.MID_ADD_TIME > 0 THEN CASE WHEN UPPER(A.MID_APPR_STAT) = 'REQ' THEN '대기' WHEN UPPER(A.MID_APPR_STAT) = 'APPROVE' THEN '연장(' || A.MID_ADD_TIME ||'분)' WHEN UPPER(A.MID_APPR_STAT) = 'REJECT' THEN '반려' END ELSE '-' END || '/' || CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.ADD_MNTS > 0 THEN CASE WHEN UPPER(A.APRV_STSCD) = 'REQ' THEN '대기' WHEN UPPER(A.APRV_STSCD) = 'APPROVE' THEN '연장(' || A.ADD_MNTS || '분)' WHEN UPPER(A.APRV_STSCD) = 'REJECT' THEN '반려' END ELSE '-' END ) AS REQ_STATUS_RESULT FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.prevNextStudentInfo 설 명 : 수강생 학습현황 > 이전, 다음 수강생 정보 */ SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT NVL(LAG(A.STD_ID) OVER (ORDER BY A.USERNM, A.USER_ID, A.STD_ID), '') AS BEFORE_STD_NO , NVL(LEAD(A.STD_ID) OVER (ORDER BY A.USERNM, A.USER_ID, A.STD_ID), '') AS AFTER_STD_NO , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE , A.* FROM (
) A ORDER BY A.LINE_NO ) A WHERE A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listNoStudyWeek 설 명 : 주차 미학습자 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SCYR , A.USERNM , A.MOBILE_NO , A.EMAIL , A.DEPTNM FROM (
SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.USER_ID , B.STD_ID , B.SCYR , C.USERNM , C.MOBILE_NO , C.EMAIL , C.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} WHERE B.ATNDLC_STSCD IS NULL OR B.ATNDLC_STSCD NOT IN ('LATE', 'COMPLETE')

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listSubmitHistoryAsmnt 설 명 : 제출/참여 이력 목록 (과제) */ SELECT A.ASMT_ID , A.ASMT_TTL , A.SEND_START_DTTM , A.SEND_END_DTTM , A.EVAL_USE_YN , A.EVL_SDTTM , A.EVL_EDTTM , CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() < A.SEND_START_DTTM THEN 'READY' WHEN FN_DTTM() BETWEEN A.SEND_START_DTTM AND A.SEND_END_DTTM THEN 'PROGRESS' WHEN FN_DTTM() > A.SEND_END_DTTM THEN 'END' ELSE 'READY' END AS ASMNT_PROGRESS , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.MRK_OYN , A.IND_YN , A.TEAM_ASMNT_CFG_YN , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , NVL(UPPER(C.SBMSN_STSCD), 'NO') AS SBMSN_STSCD , C.EVLYN , CASE WHEN A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' THEN C.SCR ELSE 0 END AS SCR , C.ASMT_SBMSN_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN C ON A.ASMT_ID = C.ASMT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND ( A.IND_YN = 'N'
OR (A.IND_YN = 'Y' AND C.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(C.SBMSN_TYCD) = 'STD') )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID )
AND A.ASMNT_OPEN_YN = 'Y' AND FN_DTTM() >= A.SEND_START_DTTM
ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listAsmntSbmtFile 설 명 : 제출/참여 이력 목록 (과제 파일) */ SELECT A.ASMT_ID , A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.FILE_ID , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.FILE_PATH , B.FILE_SAVENM , B.FILENM , B.FILE_SIZE FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_SBMT_FILE A JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmntCd} AND A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmntSendCd}

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listAsmntJoinHsty 설 명 : 제출/참여 이력 목록 (과제 활동이력) */ SELECT A.HSTRY_CD , A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SBMT_FILE_INFO , A.CNTN_IP , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_JOIN_HSTY A WHERE A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmntSendCd} AND A.ASMT_ID = #{asmntCd} ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : StdDAO.mergeStdBatch 설 명 : 개설 과목 수강생 일괄수정(머지문) */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT T USING ( SELECT #{item.stdNo} AS STD_ID , #{item.orgId} AS ORG_ID , #{item.crsCreCd} AS SBJCT_ID , #{item.userId} AS USER_ID , #{item.enrlSts} AS ATNDLC_STSCD , #{item.rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID , #{item.mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID FROM dual ) S ON (T.STD_ID = S.STD_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATNDLC_STSCD = S.ATNDLC_STSCD , T.MDFR_ID = S.MDFR_ID , T.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( STD_ID , ORG_ID , SBJCT_ID , USER_ID , ATNDLC_STSCD , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( S.STD_ID , S.ORG_ID , S.SBJCT_ID , S.USER_ID , S.ATNDLC_STSCD , S.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() , S.MDFR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listUserByStdNo 설 명 : 강의실 학생 정보 목록 조회 (by STD_ID 목록) */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.DEPTNM , B.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A, TB_LMS_USR B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.STD_ID IN
#{item}

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.selectLectEvalJoinCnt 설 명 : 강의평가 참여여부 조회 */ SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ) AS TOTAL_CNT , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(IF(A.MID_LTSATSF_CLS_YN = 'Y', 1, 0)) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ), 0) AS MID_CNT , IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(IF(A.LCTR_DGSTFN_PTCPYN = 'Y', 1, 0)) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ), 0) AS FINAL_CNT

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.countLearnStopRiskIndex 설 명 : 학업중단 위험지수 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listRegistStd 설 명 : 강의실 등록 모든 학생 조회 */ SELECT A.ATNDLC_SBJCT_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID -- , A.ATNDLC_STSCD -- , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM -- , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM -- , A.AUDIT_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_CERT_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_FNSH_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_SBJCT_ID , A.FNSH_NO , A.ACQS_CRDTS -- , A.DOC_RCPTYN -- , A.DOC_RCPT_NO -- , A.DEPTNM -- , A.RGN_CD -- , A.EMP_ID -- , A.SCR_EXLNYN -- , A.RECV_NOTICE_YN -- , A.AIS_DATA_LNKGYN -- , A.AUDITYN , A.REATNDLCYN -- , A.MID_LTSATSF_CLS_YN -- , A.LCTR_DGSTFN_PTCPYN , A.SCYR -- , A.ATNDLC_ABNDYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listStudentCreCrs 설 명 : 수강생별 과목 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND A.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND B.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : StdDAO.listStdForTrans 설 명 : 수강생목록 전체 조회(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT STD_ID , ORG_ID , SBJCT_ID , USER_ID , ATNDLC_STSCD , RECV_NOTICE_YN , AIS_DATA_LNKGYN , AUDITYN , REATNDLCYN , MID_LTSATSF_CLS_YN , LCTR_DGSTFN_PTCPYN , SCYR , ATNDLC_ABNDYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD != 'T'
